cases.title: Attended participant submits feedback within feedback window
preconditions: Event progressed to Completed state with active feedback window (current time between feedbackOpenAt and feedbackCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Attended state for the event
Authenticated Participant actor submitting for own registration
steps: Invoke feedbackService.submit(eventId, participantId, { answers: { q1: 5, q2: "Great session" } }, participantContext)
Query persisted feedback row linked to registrationId
cases.expected: Submission succeeds with feedbackId and submittedAt; answers persisted; FeedbackSubmitted domain event emitted per workflow E

cases.title: POST feedback returns HTTP 200 with feedbackId and submittedAt within window
preconditions: E2E fixture event in Completed state with feedback window active
Participant JWT for Attended registration on the event
Request body includes registrationId and non-empty answers object
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with Authorization bearer token and body { registrationId, answers: { q1: 5, q2: "Excellent session" } }
Verify response payload fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with feedbackId (UUID), submittedAt (ISO-8601), and answers echoed or retrievable; no eligibility side effects required for AC-08 scope

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle feedback step succeeds after event completion
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, and event completion
Participant Attended with feedback window open
Participant token from prior flow steps
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with participant token and answers payload after complete transition
Confirm submittedAt is present in response
cases.expected: Feedback accepted within window; Flow A can proceed to eligibility evaluation (AC-09) without blocking on feedback submission failure

cases.title: Feedback window validator accepts time inside open-close bounds
preconditions: Configured feedbackOpenAt and feedbackCloseAt with openAt < closeAt
Fixed clock now set to a time between feedbackOpenAt and feedbackCloseAt
steps: Call assertFeedbackWindowOpen(event) or equivalent isWithinTimeWindow(feedbackOpenAt, feedbackCloseAt, now) with in-window now
cases.expected: Validator passes without throwing; feedback submission pipeline may proceed

cases.title: canSubmitFeedback permits Attended participant on Completed event within window
preconditions: Participant UX gating rule canSubmitFeedback
Event state Completed, registration state Attended
Current time within feedback window bounds
steps: Evaluate canSubmitFeedback(eventState, registrationState, feedbackOpenAt, feedbackCloseAt, now)
cases.expected: Returns true; participant UI may enable feedback form per Flow 5

cases.title: Participant feedback form is enabled for attended registration within window
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on a Completed event
Feedback window is currently open
Event detail or my registrations page exposes feedback submission UI
steps: Navigate to event detail or feedback entry for the completed attended event
Observe feedback form availability and timing guidance
Submit valid answers and confirm success state
cases.expected: Feedback form is enabled (not disabled or hidden); submission shows immediate success confirmation with timestamp or completion indicator

cases.title: Feedback window validator rejects submission before feedbackOpenAt
preconditions: Event Completed with Attended registration
Fixed clock now strictly before feedbackOpenAt
steps: Call assertFeedbackWindowOpen(event) with now before window open
cases.expected: Throws ApiError with code FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED and user-safe message; HTTP mapping 422 semantic rule violation

cases.title: Feedback submission rejected after feedbackCloseAt
preconditions: Event Completed with Attended participant
Fixed clock now strictly after feedbackCloseAt
No prior feedback submission for the registration
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit with valid answers after window close
cases.expected: Submission rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED; no feedback row persisted; aligns with forms validation QA scenario for out-of-window feedback

cases.title: POST feedback outside configured window returns semantic error
preconditions: Completed event with feedback window not yet open (feedbackOpenAt in the future) or already closed
Participant JWT for Attended registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with valid answers while current time is outside window
cases.expected: HTTP 422 (or documented semantic status) with error.code FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED; response includes requestId; no feedbackId returned

cases.title: Non-attended registration cannot submit feedback
preconditions: Event Completed with feedback window active
Registration still in Registered or CheckedIn state (not yet Attended)
steps: Call assertRegistrationFeedbackEligible(registration) or canSubmitFeedback with non-Attended state
cases.expected: Validation fails with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED; feedback only permitted for Attended registrations per participant UX rules

cases.title: Participant without valid registration for event cannot submit feedback
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window
Authenticated participant with no registration or cancelled registration for the event
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit for eventId where actor has no valid registration holder relationship
cases.expected: Rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED per BR-15; enforces valid registration holder requirement

cases.title: Duplicate official feedback submission returns FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE
preconditions: Attended participant already submitted one official feedback for the event within window
Event rule config does not allow in-window updates (or second distinct submit attempted)
steps: Submit feedback successfully once
Attempt second feedbackService.submit with different answers for same registration
cases.expected: Second attempt rejected with FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE (HTTP 409); original feedback row unchanged per one-official-feedback policy

cases.title: In-window feedback update allowed when configured per BR-16
preconditions: Event rule config permits feedback updates within window
Participant has existing feedback submission within active window
steps: Submit updated answers for same registration within feedback window
Read persisted feedback answers
cases.expected: Update succeeds without FEEDBACK_DUPLICATE; latest answers stored; submittedAt may refresh per module policy

cases.title: Empty answers object rejected at schema validation
preconditions: Valid Attended registration and open feedback window
Request payload with answers: {}
steps: Call assertAnswersValid({}) or POST feedback with empty answers
cases.expected: Rejected with INVALID_INPUT (HTTP 400); no feedback persisted

cases.title: Organizer cannot submit feedback on behalf of participant
preconditions: Completed event with active feedback window and Attended participant
OrganizerAdmin JWT (no Participant role for target registration)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with organizer token and participant registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED; only Participant role may submit own feedback per permission matrix

cases.title: Unauthenticated feedback POST returns 401
preconditions: Completed event with open feedback window
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no feedback row created

cases.title: Participant cannot submit feedback for another participant's registration
preconditions: Completed event with two Attended participants A and B
Active feedback window
Authenticated as participant A
steps: Attempt feedbackService.submit using participant B's registrationId while authenticated as A
cases.expected: Rejected with FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED or 403; scope constraint FR-26 enforced

cases.title: Successful feedback submission returns immediate success payload
preconditions: Attended participant within feedback window on Completed event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback with valid payload
Inspect response latency and body
cases.expected: Synchronous HTTP 200 with feedbackId and submittedAt; client receives actionable success without polling; satisfies NFR-13 immediate feedback on critical action

cases.title: Rejected feedback submission returns deterministic error code and message
preconditions: Completed event with feedback window closed or not yet open
Participant JWT for Attended registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback outside window
Parse error envelope
cases.expected: Response includes error.code FEEDBACK_NOT_ALLOWED, user-safe message, and requestId per standard error contract; same inputs produce same error code on repeat

cases.title: Feedback validation is deterministic under fixed clock
preconditions: Fixed clock abstraction per testing plan deterministic controls
Identical event, registration, and answers fixtures across runs
steps: Run in-window feedback submit scenario twice with identical inputs and clock
Compare outcomes
cases.expected: Both runs accept or reject consistently with same error codes; no flakiness from timing

cases.title: Feedback form shows clear blocking reason when window is closed
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration
Feedback window closed (after feedbackCloseAt)
steps: Navigate to event detail or feedback entry
Attempt to access or submit feedback form
cases.expected: Form disabled or submission blocked with concrete message (e.g. feedback period ended); not a generic error identifier in user-facing text per microcopy standards
